summary: Well-structured test suite with good coverage of main requirements. All core features tested: manifest parsing (package.json and requirements.txt), license checking (allow/deny/unknown), reporting, CLI, and GitHub Actions workflow integration via act. Three workflow scenarios (mixed-licenses, all-approved, all-denied) provide solid functional coverage with precise output assertion (exact summary format and per-dependency lines). Parser tests cover whitespace handling, comments, version operators. Error handling tested for lookup failures, malformed JSON, unsupported manifest types. Effective mock design with injected LicenseLookup. Missing edge cases: empty manifests, all-unknown-licenses scenario, requirements.txt in workflow tests, explicit case-insensitive license matching verification. Policy file error scenarios (missing, malformed policy.json) not tested. Minor design issue in cli.test.ts workdir cleanup. Overall strong regression detection for main paths; act integration adds significant CI/CD confidence but missing some boundary conditions that could slip through.
